name: Chicken Breasts w/ Sour Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll each chicken breast in one slice of bacon. If the breasts are unusually large, additional bacon may be needed to ensure they are completely covered.
2. Shred the smoked beef and place it in a 13 x 9-inch baking dish. Top with the chicken breasts.
3. Combine the soup and sour cream. Spoon over the chicken breasts.
4. Bake, uncovered, at 275°F for 3 hours, or until the chicken is tender. If the dish begins to brown too quickly, cover tightly with foil.
